title: Robust Woodfired Australian Kangaroo Skillet
description: A hearty one-pot dish featuring kangaroo, Grand Marnier, and herbal notes, cooked to perfection in a wood-fired raclette grill. This satvik-friendly recipe is perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired raclette grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, whisk together Grand Marnier, olive oil, garlic, thyme, rosemary, salt, and black pepper.
Add the kangaroo strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Place the kangaroo strips in the raclette grill and cook for 5 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Remove the kangaroo from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the kangaroo into thin strips and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh rosemary and thyme, if desired.
Serve with roasted vegetables or a side salad for a complete meal.
